nasb.text: Indeed, I brought you up from the land of Egypt And ransomed you from the house of slavery, And I sent before you Moses, Aaron and Miriam.

esv.text: For I brought you up from the land of Egypt and redeemed you from the house of slavery, and I sent before you Moses, Aaron, and Miriam.

cnv.text: 我曾經把你從埃及地領上來， 把你從為奴之家贖出來； 我也差派了摩西、亞倫和米利暗在你前面行。

ccb.text: 我曾带领你们离开埃及， 把你们从受奴役之地救赎出来， 又差遣摩西、亚伦和米利暗引领你们。
